ai_zone_description: High-value urban land cluster with strong facility access and short road distance.
Higher-value rural or peri-urban land cluster with lower facility access.
Mid-high rural land cluster with better-than-average accessibility and services.
Broader lower-mid rural land cluster with weaker access and lower density.
Urban flat or apartment cluster with strong amenity access and low value-per-area scale.
Lower-value flat or apartment cluster with weaker amenity access and peri-urban profile.
Lowest-tier rural land cluster with limited road access and sparse amenities.
